info.name: Alsaleem Call Center API
info.description: Staff/call-center API for the web frontend. Run Auth > Staff Login first to save staffToken.

request.description: Returns token and user with permissions.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "token": "abc123...",
  "user": {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Admin User",
    "email": "admin@example.com",
    "role": "admin",
    "role_id": 1,
    "permissions": {
      "chatting": true,
      "patient_results": true,
      "patient_management": true,
      "user_management": true,
      "roles_management": true,
      "doctor_management": true,
      "specialties_management": true,
      "announcement_management": true,
      "slider_management": true,
      "lab_tests_management": true,
      "lab_test_requests_management": true,
      "branch_management": true
    }
  }
}

request.description: No auth. Max ~50 MB. Use url in chat attachments.
20/page. Filter by patient attributes and result metadata.
Results for a patient. Optional doctor_id filter.
Single result with doctor, patient, comments_count.
Single request with doctor and items.
Status: reviewed, approved, or rejected. Sends FCM to doctor.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Marks doctor messages as read. Poll with since_id.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 201) { try { var j = pm.response.json(); if (j.id) pm.collectionVariables.set('messageId', j.id); } catch(e){} }

request.description: All 12 permission keys required as booleans.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Receptionist",
  "slug": "receptionist",
  "permissions": {
    "chatting": true,
    "patient_results": true,
    "patient_management": false,
    "user_management": false,
    "roles_management": false,

    "slider_management": false,
    "lab_tests_management": false,

  }
}
